title: Hoffmannseggella reginae
taxonomy: Hoffmannseggella reginae is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is a part of the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. intro: Hoffmannseggella reginae, also known as the Queen's Pleurothallis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
